text: Healthy living is about more than just eating vegetables and going to the gym. A balanced diet, including plenty of fruits, vegetables, whole grains, and lean proteins, provides the energy your body needs. Regular exercise, even a daily 30-minute walk, strengthens your heart and muscles and helps manage stress. However, good health also depends on getting enough sleep, typically 7-9 hours each night, to allow your body to recover. Equally important is your mental health; try to find time for relaxation and hobbies. Finally, achieving a healthy work-life balance is crucial—it means setting boundaries and making time for family, friends, and yourself.
